allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('providerType:', d.get\('providerType'\)\); print\('fallbackReason:', d.get\('fallbackReason'\)\); print\('stock count:', len\(d.get\('stocks',[]\)\)\);  print\('first stock:', json.dumps\(d['stocks'][0] if d.get\('stocks'\) else {}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\(d, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
